zh.Godrevy, Saint Ives, Cornwall, England,: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 艾伍士
zh.lifeSummary: Nicholas Budockshide是Alan Budockshide的兒子，於1270年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 艾伍士。他於1298年與Joanna Budockshide在英國可瓦爾雷達盧斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Godrevy, Saint Ives, Cornwall, England,: 英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 艾伍士
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Nicholas Budockshide是Alan Budockshide的儿子，于1270年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 艾伍士。他于1298年与Joanna Budockshide在英国可瓦爾雷達盧斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: Nicholas Budockshide was born in 1270, in St Ives, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom as the son of Alan Budockshide. He married Joanna Budockshide in 1298, in Redruth, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Nicholas Budockshide est né en 1270, à St Ives, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Alan Budockshide. Il a épousé Joanna Budockshide en 1298, à Redruth, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.Godrevy, Saint Ives, Cornwall, England,: St Ives, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Nicholas Budockshide wurde 1270 in St Ives, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Alan Budockshide geboren. Er hat 1298 in Redruth, Cornwall, England Joanna Budockshide geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.Godrevy, Saint Ives, Cornwall, England,: イギリスイギリスコルンワルスト イベス
ja.Redruth, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルレドルス
ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Budockshideは1270年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト イベスでAlan Budockshideの息子として生まれた。1298年にイギリスコルンワルレドルスでJoanna Budockshideと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Budockshide(은)는 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 이브스에서 Alan Budockshide의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1298년 영국 코른월 레드루스에서 Joanna Budockshide(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Nicholas Budockshide родился в 1270 г. в местности ст ивесь, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Alan Budockshide. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Budockshide в 1298 г. в местности редрут, корнвалл, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в его родном городе.
